title: psychotria hirta
intro: Psychotria hirta, also known as Kava or Yanggon, is a plant species native to the Pacific Island region. It has been used for centuries in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to interact with the body's GABA receptors to produce a calming effect. The health benefits of Psychotria hirta include reducing anxiety and stress, improving sleep quality, and alleviating pain. The plant is typically prepared as a tea or used in topical applications, with the active compounds being extracted and concentrated through various herbal preparations such as ethanol or CO2 extraction.
